understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. A level is won only when all goal tiles are occupied by selectable pieces at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3 pixels per step in the chosen direction. Pushing may occur if a pushable object is adjacent in the movement direction. Walls may block movement. Switching control to another selectable piece uses the CLICK action with the exact pixel coordinates of that piece; it fails if no selectable piece exists at those coordinates. The movement_blocked hints are heuristic and not always accurate. Each level has a finite step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. A level is won only when all goal tiles are occupied by selectable pieces at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3 pixels per step in the chosen direction. Pushing may occur if a pushable object is adjacent in the movement direction. Walls may block movement. Switching control to another selectable piece uses the CLICK action with the exact pixel coordinates of that piece; it fails if no selectable piece exists at those coordinates. The movement_blocked hints are heuristic and not always accurate. Each level has a finite step budget.
